---
title: "Desarrollo Humano, Desigualdad y Pobreza Multidimensional"
subtitle: "Un Análisis Empírico para la Provincia de Pichincha en el Año 2025"
author: "Erick Fabricio Condoy Seraquive"
date: "2026-06-30"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
  docx:
    reference-doc: template.docx
bibliography: ../../../bibliography/references.bib
---

{{< include chapters/01-introduccion.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/02-objetivos.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/03-metodologia.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/04-resultados.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/05-conclusiones.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/06-recomendaciones.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/08-bibliografia.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/07-anexos.qmd >}}
